name: Shatonna Hightower
ai_summary: Shatonna Hightower has two years of childcare experience working with two-year-olds and is located in Atlanta, GA (relocating to Marietta). She is available full-time or part-time and demonstrates a gentle conflict resolution approach, believing she'll be a great teacher due to her consistency, fun nature, safety focus, and love for children.

transcripts.q3: My name is Hannah Hightower. I have two years of experience in childcare and both years. I was working with the two-year-olds
transcripts.q4: I'm located in Atlanta, Georgia about to relocate to Marietta Georgia. So I would like white between Atlanta and Marietta area.
transcripts.q5: I'm looking for a full time, I would take part-time. I'm looking for hours. 825 is, you know I could do 66 to that's fine.
transcripts.q6: Sometimes the toddlers do not like to share. And one thing that I like to do is tell them that is not how we treat our friends and we hug it out.
transcripts.q7: I think I will be a great teacher for up kid, because I am consistent. I am fun. I am safe and I love children.
